textByHash.9280e226e030e7fd9df7aba7b5aed2ad35f66644: Leave me alone. I have work to do.
textByHash.7ce4ad55b182f2611df8754cea8bc9df7b363b3a: Whatever you want, the answer's no.
textByHash.0d70e907f9c4b557eae5a1d578e568f917e13b57: I don't have time to talk to you.
textByHash.002127e317f22b0310f5cebdf0092f99737f0e2b: Well, I could do with a good rest, but fine otherwise.
textByHash.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
textByHash.90aaec96f10159d49c3037f4908256cd74c5e996: Sorry, but I have lots of work to do.
textByHash.d5be914f38e453bfb2274bcf851a3f2a3199546c: Not too bad, but the work is definitely tiring.
textByHash.038f699e9c0db9daf2b1f1935c7758a62c3184fc: Of course! These spots are the best thing since log rollers!
textByHash.c23ea6d55c43e2c6d97cf0ecd5d5f44a3efa59f1: Well thanks to these spots, the city has been under quarantine. That means there's no goods coming in or out. No goods means we don't have any work to do!
textByHash.b4ad95b0857166bda01b5201e61ddcafc34852be: I would take a dermatological irritation over back-breaking, mind-numbing labour any day!
textByHash.6138a533f93349c68a69af223578929583b7da67: The High Priest has determined that these spots aren't contagious. He's opened the city up again, which means we have to go back to work.
textByHash.361e7668baf9bb1c63d3a96fa8464307483e690a: Now that all the plagues have been cured, we've had to go back to work.
textByHash.474984d3d25cfd2a1e09f048ed9b043de5d16558: What, so that I can get back to work?
textByHash.926efc8c4acccd6212053d17ad87415497b7c270: I know your type, trying to ruin the small man's fun! I won't have it!
textByHash.fa3ead7a740bd6a7f14c484b0f440b1e957ceb5f: No, I don't want to buy anything.
textByHash.2b05a71cddb56bff28379353b80516a46ade2d0d: Can't stop to talk. I have work to do.
textByHash.fb86b654cb539a846fe9219703a6b13babcd6dec: The beast still rages, but we're managing.
textByHash.e1b523a75a20ffaae844c9348fa37ebf9ffa5242: Plenty of treasure and materials to be found in the tunnels, at least!
textByHash.3ff410c3a7c1087644609bf856a5c46d7140d11c: The raw materials will be used to maintain Cam Torum. As for everything else, if you help us, you're allowed a share of the treasures.
textByHash.bd87266629b121bab9930f9b2d81307094044514: Why wouldn't I be? I'm not the one lost in the mountain!
textByHash.8a68d1b61f5d5fa1ea3e7cf302ff9108dbc104f1: Karlo! Oh sweet Karlo... An inspiration to us all!
textByHash.75cfd1e83caef0ec274df850a1a3190dee4fe200: He really knew how to swing a pickaxe, but where did that get him?!
textByHash.1f998404d084244578e0f74e9bb8d074b2342b84: Trapped in the depths under all that rock and stone...
textByHash.0118ad87b0882802b96e55b924fb465edc1ff4bb: What I do know is that I do this for Karlo. Let's make him proud!
textByHash.05f5e265bfdad7769c85065b3e78f15b7497ef75: See that big mountain outside? That's the Darkfrost. There's a nice beastie up there called the Hueycoatl.
textByHash.d4823922dd0a2d94b833e47160d7942de2ebc848: You humans don't seem to care that much, so as usual it's up to us to stop it making a big mess of the entire area.
textByHash.35b5ab9e659cac0f1f1f81f584fa82e2f8e92bba: I am. Dealing with the Hueycoatl is hard work, and it's not like you humans care enough to contribute much.
textByHash.80401444cb4dc9063c996aae42e966414e220cfc: You are? Oh... Fair enough then. In that case, head on up the mountain and get stuck in.
textByHash.026548a87056ad79afcef74eb42857c90d1c6a96: You have? Oh... Fair enough then. I guess you've earned yourself a break as well.
textByHash.eaec929b203fcb43087f4929ed0ffe1bbed4d735: Well I could do with a good rest, but fine otherwise.
